mainEntity.name: Deadline to settle slip and fall comp claim in Sandy Utah?
mainEntity.text: Deadline to settle slip and fall comp claim in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No strict deadline but settle post-MMI after impairment rating. Can reopen within 6 years for surgery.[7]

suggestedAnswer.text: Rush settlements undervalue future needs. Wait for full records. Lump sum vs ongoing tradeoffs. Attorney negotiates offsets. Local practice settles 70% pre-hearing.[7]

name: Settlement Timing for Sandy Slip Claims
description: No strict deadline but settle post-MMI after impairment rating. Can reopen within 6 years for surgery.[7]
